confirmed_issues.summary: GET /api/feed accepted any size value, so a caller could request an excessively large page and force avoidable database and DTO-enrichment work.
confirmed_issues.fix: FeedService now clamps page to 0+ and size to 1..100 before building the PageRequest.

confirmed_issues.summary: The public feed filter selects had no accessible names, which made them hard to target in tests and weaker for assistive technology users.
confirmed_issues.fix: FilterBar now passes aria-labels for the city and topic selects, and the shared Select component forwards native select attributes.

advisories.summary: FeedService maps each memory through MemoryService.enrichDto, which issues per-item like-count, comment-count, and liked-by-me queries. This is acceptable for MVP traffic but should move to batch aggregation before scaling the public feed.

LikeService.toggle performs read-then-write logic around the unique (user_id, memory_id) constraint. Concurrent toggle requests can still race and surface a duplicate-key failure until the service catches and normalizes that database exception.
